description: Validates that the type inspector can correctly resolve a method on a deeply nested field from a third-party package, even when the calling component does not directly import that package. This tests the context-switching logic of the method resolver.

assertNodes.description: The full expression should resolve the method call and return a string.

assertOnSubExpression.description: Step 1: The first field access resolves to the service response type.
Step 2: The second field access resolves to the DTO type.
Step 3: The third field access resolves to the maths.Money type.
Step 4: The method itself should be found and identified as a function.
